hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, os, subprocess; d = json.load(sys.stdin); f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', ''); ext = os.path.splitext(f)[1] if f and os.path.exists(f) else ''; cmds = {'.py': ['ruff', 'check', '--fix', f], '.ts': ['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], '.tsx': ['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], '.js': ['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], '.jsx': ['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], '.css': ['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f]}; cmd = cmds.get(ext); (cmd and subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True)) if cmd else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys, json, os, datetime; d = json.load(sys.stdin); log_dir = os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/logs'); os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True); open(os.path.join(log_dir, 'corrections.jsonl'), 'a').write(json.dumps({'ts': datetime.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'type': 'tool_failure', 'tool': d.get('tool_name', ''), 'error': str(d.get('tool_response', ''))[:300]}) + chr(10))" 2>/dev/null || true
